description: Phase 4 core energy and macro engines for mealplan: implement deterministic BMR/TDEE and macro target formulas with strict height input and negative-fat rejection.

userStories.title: Implement activity multiplier mapping
userStories.description: As a domain calculator, I want one canonical activity-factor mapping so TDEE results are consistent across all callers.
acceptanceCriteria: Add canonical mapping: low -> 1.2, medium -> 1.375, high -> 1.55.
Mapping uses existing ActivityLevel enum values only.
Mapping is colocated with energy calculation logic with no duplication across modules.
Unit tests verify each enum maps to the expected numeric factor.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement BMR calculation with gender-specific formulas
userStories.description: As a domain calculator, I want BMR calculated by Mifflin-St Jeor so energy output follows requirements and model specifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement formulas: male BMR = 10*weight_kg + 6.25*height_cm - 5*age + 5, female BMR = 10*weight_kg + 6.25*height_cm - 5*age - 161.
Formula selection is based only on canonical Gender enum.
Function is deterministic and pure with no hidden state.
Unit tests verify male and female outputs with fixed fixture inputs.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement TDEE calculation from BMR and activity level
userStories.description: As an application service, I want TDEE derived from BMR and activity factor so downstream macro calculations have a stable calorie input.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement TDEE = BMR * activity_factor.
TDEE output is float and remains unrounded internally.
Function accepts typed profile input and returns deterministic value.
Unit tests verify TDEE for all three activity levels from the same BMR baseline.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Use required height input in energy calculation contracts
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want energy formulas to consume explicit height_cm input so BMR/TDEE no longer depend on fallback behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Energy service signature requires height_cm from typed profile/request contracts.
No fallback or default-height code path exists in Phase 4 domain services.
Validation contract for height_cm is strict integer > 0 with no upper bound.
No numeric-string coercion is accepted for height_cm.
Unit tests verify BMR/TDEE with explicit height inputs for both genders.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement macro target calculator for protein and carbs by mode
userStories.description: As a domain calculator, I want macro targets derived from bodyweight and carb mode so output contracts can be filled consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement protein formula: protein_g = 2 * weight_kg.
Implement carb-mode formulas: low 3*weight_kg, normal 5*weight_kg, periodized 4*weight_kg baseline.
Calculator consumes canonical CarbMode enum only.
Unit tests verify expected outputs for each carb mode with fixed weight fixtures.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement fat-as-residual calculation with negative-fat rejection
userStories.description: As a domain calculator, I want fat computed from remaining calories and rejected when negative so impossible macro states cannot propagate.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement residual formulas: fat_kcal = tdee_kcal - (protein_g * 4) - (carbs_g * 4), fat_g = fat_kcal / 9.
Reject when fat_g < 0 with deterministic DomainRuleError.
Error category remains stable for CLI exit-code mapping compatibility.
Unit tests cover positive fat and negative-fat rejection cases.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Provide composed domain API for Phase 4 calculations
userStories.description: As an application orchestrator, I want a simple typed entrypoint for energy and macro calculations so Phase 8 orchestration can integrate without formula duplication.
acceptanceCriteria: Expose typed domain service functions for energy calculation (tdee_kcal) and macro target calculation (MacroTargets).
Service boundaries keep formulas in domain and out of CLI/application parsing modules.
Service signatures align with existing Phase 2 contracts and Phase 3 validation outputs.
Unit tests verify composed usage and return types.
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add formula and edge-case test matrix
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a focused matrix of formula and boundary tests so regressions in numeric logic are caught immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Add parameterized tests for BMR and TDEE scenarios across genders and activity levels.
Add parameterized tests for carb mode outputs (low, normal, periodized).
Add tests for fat residual exactness and negative-fat rejection.
Tests assert deterministic error type/category instead of brittle full-message snapshots.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Align tests and docs with required height input
userStories.description: As a contributor, I want Phase 4 tests and documentation to use required height so formula behavior is unambiguous.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit fixtures for energy formulas include explicit height_cm values.
Test names and assertions no longer reference default-height behavior.
Phase 4 docs reference required height_cm input and strict integer > 0 validation.
References to temporary height ADR assumptions are removed from this phase backlog.
Typecheck passes
